Yang Pei (Kongju) жҘҠжІӣ (еӯ”жё )
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Pei (жҘҠжІӣ), styledKongju (еӯ”жё ). Modest and lawful, he earned Cao CaoвҖҷs respect. Yang Pei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
